---
title: "detect_sql_dialect"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L876)

# `detect_sql_dialect()`

Detect SQL dialect from a DBI connection

## Usage

```r
detect_sql_dialect(.con)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.con` | A DBI connection object |

## Value

A character string: "snowflake", "duckdb", or "postgres"
